message:
feat(runtime): add coalesce_ms telemetry to resize coalescer

Enhance resize coalescer diagnostics with timing information for
the coalescing phase itself, enabling better observability into
resize event handling performance.

Changes:
- Add `coalesce_ms: Option<f64>` field to DecisionLog struct
  - Records elapsed time from first pending resize to apply
  - None when resize is not applied (coalesce action)
  - Populated when resize is applied or forced

- Update JSONL logging format to include coalesce_ms field
  - Outputs numeric milliseconds or "null" when not applicable
  - Maintains backwards-compatible JSON structure

- Update log_decision() signature to accept coalesce_ms parameter
  - Passed through from apply_pending_at() with timing data
  - Passed as None for skip/coalesce actions

- Include coalesce_ms in deterministic hash computation
  - Hash presence bit and value when Some
  - Ensures replay consistency verification

This telemetry supports:
- Diagnosing resize storms and their duration
- Tuning coalesce thresholds based on actual timing data
- E2E test validation of coalescing behavior (bd-1rz0.7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
